title: Elite X Warfare (Discontinued)
description: Ported Guns from my Elite's Modern Guns project
body:
# Elite X Warfare 

Weapons pack for Vics Point Blank mod that Adds Weapons ported from My old Elite's Modern guns Project
I have now Completely lost my motivation on working on this pack i gaveit 4 months to it so i have decided to stop working and discontneing this pack forvever


## Note  : This Project is Officially discontinued Abandoned it will no longer recieve any updates

## Requirements
- Vic's Point Blank 1.20.1 
you can find it here it is not aviable on modrinth yet 
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vics-point-blank](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vics-point-blank)


- GeckoLib
[https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
 

## How to Install

1. Install Vics Point Blank Mod into your Mods folder.

2. Create a Folder named "pointblank" to your minecraft directory.

3. Drop the Zip File into the "pointblank" Folder. and now you are done



## F.A.Q

 

Q1: Any Recipes?

Ans: This is a First Release of the Elite X Warfare Content Pack I hope you liked it.

Q2: Can I use it in my Modpack?

Ans: Yes of course, why not

Note : Do not ReUpload the Content pack to any other third party Website without my permission, otherwise i will take a strict action!
